body.u: As I stood there looking out of the window I began to think back over the last 50 years. As I stayed on at school an extra year to learn Shorthand and Typing, my first job was in an office, as an office junior. I stayed as junior for two years, untilluntil the lady above me left. I stayed at that position for three years, untilluntil I became Personal Secretary. That position lasted for a further four years.
I left that firm to join another company. By this time I had married and had a baby girl. My husband is a steel worker and works for the Steel Mill.

Berfore we had Heidi (my daughter) we used to live in Sittingboure then when my husband was transferedtransferred we moved to London where we still live now. I had another baby a boy this time named Gavin. I only work half the hours I used to now as the children take up most of my time
Heidi decided that she wanted to be a secretary the same as I did, so she stayed on at school. Gavin decided that he.
